[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010110100 5
1 1010100110 5
2 0110011100 5
3 0001000100 2
4 1100100010 4
5 0001101011 5
6 0110100011 5
7 1110110111 8

01 10 0010000100 2
12 21 0000000100 1
23 32 0000000000 a
34 43 0000100010 2
45 54 0000100011 3
56 65 0110100011 5 match 6
67 76 1010110100 5 match 0
70 07 1010100100 4

02 20 0000000100 1
13 31 0100000000 1
24 42 0001000000 1
35 53 0100100010 3
46 64 0000100011 3
57 75 0010100000 2
60 06 1010100110 5 match 1
71 17 0010010100 3

14 41 0000001000 1
25 52 0000000000 a
36 63 1100100010 4 match 4
47 74 0000100000 1
50 05 0010100010 3
61 16 0110010100 4
72 27 0000000100 1

04 40 0000100010 2
15 51 0110000000 2
26 62 0000000100 1
37 73 1000100000 2
